texto: Getting ready to wrestle is like getting ready for a car crash. Getting ready to work with Brock Lesnar is like knowing you're going to get hit by a bus and the bus is going to back over you. If I'm going to work 'WrestleMania,' 16 weeks out I have to start training like I'm Mayweather getting ready for a fight.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Triple H: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Getting ready to wrestle is like getting ready for a car crash. Getting ready to work with Brock …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, training pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

texto: Being on the road is no excuse for having a poor diet. I don't like fast food, but if I have to, I'll order three plain grilled chicken sandwiches and throw out the buns.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Triple H: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Being on the road is no excuse for having a poor diet. I don't like fast food, but if I have to, …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, food, road pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e road.
